metadata.name: positionbt
metadata.summary: PositionBT is a simple, fast, and customizable backtesting framework that directly evaluates trading strategies through position data (ranging from -1 to 1).

classes.name: positionbt.visualization.registry.FigureRegistry

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.registry.FigureRegistry.register
documentation:
Register a figure class

Args:
    figure_cls: Figure class to register (must inherit from BaseFigure)

Raises:
    ValueError: If figure class is not a subclass of BaseFigure

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.registry.FigureRegistry.get
documentation:
Get a figure class by name

Args:
    name: Name of the figure to retrieve

Returns:
    Figure class

Raises:
    ValueError: If figure name is not found in registry

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.registry.FigureRegistry.available_figures
documentation:
Get list of all available figure names

Returns:
    List of registered figure names

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.registry.FigureRegistry._load_built_in_figures
documentation:
Automatically load built-in figures

This method scans the figures module and registers all classes
that inherit from BaseFigure (excluding BaseFigure itself)
Registry for managing visualization figures

classes.name: positionbt.visualization.base.BaseFigure

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.base.BaseFigure.__init__
documentation:
Initialize base figure

Args:
    results: Backtest result object containing data for visualization

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.base.BaseFigure.create
documentation:
Create the figure

This method must be implemented by subclasses to create
their specific visualization.

Returns:
    Plotly figure object

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.base.BaseFigure._create_base_figure
documentation:
Create base figure object with common settings

Returns:
    Plotly figure object with default layout settings

class_variables.name: positionbt.visualization.base.BaseFigure.name
documentation: Unique identifier for the figure

class_variables.name: positionbt.visualization.base.BaseFigure.title
documentation: Display title for the figure
Base class for visualization figures

classes.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer.__init__
documentation:
Initialize visualizer

Args:
    results: BacktestResult object
    params: Dictionary of backtest parameters
    template_path: Path to HTML template file
    figures: List of figure names to display. If empty list, no figures will be shown.
            If None, all registered figures will be shown.
    notes: Optional notes to display in the report

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer._generate_all_figures
documentation:
Generate HTML code for all figures

Returns:
    Dictionary mapping figure names to their HTML representations

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer._generate_backtest_params_html
documentation:
Generate HTML for backtest parameters

Returns:
    HTML string containing formatted backtest parameters

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer._generate_data_info_html
documentation:
Generate HTML for data information

Returns:
    HTML string containing formatted data information

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer._generate_metrics_html
documentation:
Generate HTML for metrics

Returns:
    HTML string containing formatted metrics

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer._generate_notes_html
documentation:
Generate HTML for notes section

Returns:
    HTML string containing formatted notes, or empty string if no notes

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer.generate_html_report
documentation:
Generate HTML backtest report

Args:
    output_path: Path where the HTML report will be saved

methods.name: positionbt.visualization.visualizer.BacktestVisualizer.show_in_browser
documentation:
Display backtest results in browser

Args:
    delay: Delay in seconds before cleaning up temporary file
Backtest result visualizer

classes.name: positionbt.indicators.registry.IndicatorRegistry

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.registry.IndicatorRegistry._register_builtin_indicators
documentation:
Automatically register all built-in indicators

This method scans the indicators module and registers all classes
that inherit from BaseIndicator

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.registry.IndicatorRegistry._sort_indicators_by_dependency
documentation:
Sort indicators based on their dependencies

This method performs a topological sort to ensure indicators
are calculated in the correct order based on their dependencies

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.registry.IndicatorRegistry.register
documentation:
Register a new indicator

Args:
    indicator: Instance of BaseIndicator to register
    update_dependency: Whether to update dependency sorting after registration

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.registry.IndicatorRegistry.get_indicator
documentation:
Get indicator instance by name

Args:
    name: Name of the indicator to retrieve

Returns:
    New instance of the requested indicator

Raises:
    ValueError: If indicator name is not found in registry

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.registry.IndicatorRegistry.available_indicators
documentation:
Get list of all available indicator names

Returns:
    Sorted list of registered indicator names

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.registry.IndicatorRegistry.sorted_indicators
documentation:
Get all indicators sorted by dependency

Returns:
    List of indicator names in dependency order
Registry for managing indicators

Calculate total return

documentation:
Dependencies on other indicators

Returns:
    Set containing "annual_return" and "volatility"

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.SharpeRatio.calculate
documentation:
Calculate Sharpe ratio

Args:
    cache: Dictionary containing calculation cache

Returns:
    Sharpe ratio as a float

Format Sharpe ratio value

Returns:

classes.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.MaxDrawdown

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.MaxDrawdown.calculate
documentation:
Calculate maximum drawdown

Calculation method:
1. Calculate historical peak at each point
2. Calculate drawdown from peak at each point
3. Find the maximum drawdown value

Args:
    cache: Dictionary containing calculation cache

Returns:
    Maximum drawdown as a float

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.MaxDrawdown.format
documentation:
Format maximum drawdown value as percentage

Args:
    value: Maximum drawdown value

Returns:
    Formatted string with percentage
Maximum drawdown indicator

classes.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.MaxDrawdownDuration

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.MaxDrawdownDuration.requires
documentation:
Dependencies on other indicators

Returns:
    Set containing "max_drawdown"

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.MaxDrawdownDuration.calculate
documentation:
Calculate maximum drawdown duration in days

Args:
    cache: Dictionary containing calculation cache

Returns:
    Maximum drawdown duration in days as a float

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.MaxDrawdownDuration.format
documentation:
Format maximum drawdown duration as days

Args:
    value: Maximum drawdown duration in days

Returns:
    Formatted string with number of days
Maximum drawdown duration indicator

classes.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.WinRate

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.WinRate.calculate
documentation:
Calculate win rate

Args:
    cache: Dictionary containing calculation cache

Returns:
    Win rate as a float

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.WinRate.format
documentation:
Format win rate value as percentage

Args:
    value: Win rate value

Returns:
    Formatted string with percentage
Win rate indicator

classes.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.AvgDrawdown

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.AvgDrawdown.calculate
documentation:
Calculate average drawdown

Calculation method:
1. Calculate drawdown at each point
2. Consider only non-zero drawdowns
3. Calculate the average of these drawdowns

Args:
    cache: Dictionary containing calculation cache

Returns:
    Average drawdown as a float

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.AvgDrawdown.format
documentation:
Format average drawdown value as percentage

Args:
    value: Average drawdown value

Returns:
    Formatted string with percentage
Average drawdown indicator

classes.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.ProfitLossRatio

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.ProfitLossRatio.calculate
documentation:
Calculate profit-loss ratio

Args:
    cache: Dictionary containing calculation cache

Returns:
    Profit-loss ratio as a float

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.indicators.ProfitLossRatio.format
documentation:
Format profit-loss ratio value

Args:
    value: Profit-loss ratio value

Returns:
    Formatted string with two decimal places or infinity symbol

Profit-loss ratio indicator

Calculation method: average profit / absolute value of average loss
Profit-loss ratio = |average return of winning trades| / |average return of losing trades|

classes.name: positionbt.indicators.base.BaseIndicator

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.base.BaseIndicator.name
documentation:
Indicator name

Returns:
    Unique identifier string for the indicator

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.base.BaseIndicator.requires
documentation:
Dependencies on other indicators

Returns:
    Set of indicator names that this indicator depends on

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.base.BaseIndicator.calculate
documentation:
Calculate indicator value

Args:
    cache: Dictionary containing calculation cache and intermediate results

Returns:
    Either a float value or a DataFrame containing the calculation results

methods.name: positionbt.indicators.base.BaseIndicator.format
documentation:
Format indicator value

Args:
    value: Raw indicator value to be formatted

Returns:
    Formatted string representation of the value
Base class for indicators

modules.name: positionbt
documentation:
PositionBT is a simple, fast, and customizable backtesting framework
that directly evaluates trading strategies through position data (ranging from -1 to 1).

modules.name: positionbt.core.constants
documentation: Constants used throughout the package

methods.name: positionbt.core.backtester.PositionBacktester._calculate_funding_curve
documentation:
Calculate funding curve

Args:
    merged_df: DataFrame containing close prices and positions

Returns:
    DataFrame with time, funding curve and returns

methods.name: positionbt.core.backtester.PositionBacktester.add_indicator
documentation:
Add custom indicator

Args:
    indicator: Custom indicator instance inheriting from BaseIndicator

methods.name: positionbt.core.backtester.PositionBacktester.run
documentation:
Run backtest and return results

Args:
    position_df: DataFrame containing position data

Returns:
    BacktestResult: Object containing backtest results

Raises:
    ValueError: If position data is invalid

methods.name: positionbt.core.backtester.PositionBacktester._prepare_cache
documentation:
Prepare calculation cache

Args:
    merged_df: DataFrame containing time, funding_curve and returns columns

Returns:
    Dict containing cached data needed for calculations

methods.name: positionbt.core.backtester.PositionBacktester._calculate_indicators
documentation:
Calculate indicators

Args:
    cache: Calculation cache dictionary

Returns:
    Dict containing calculation results with both DataFrames and indicator values

methods.name: positionbt.core.backtester.PositionBacktester.params
documentation:
Get backtester parameters

Returns:
    Dict containing backtester parameters:
        - commission: Commission rate
        - annual_trading_days: Number of trading days per year
        - indicators: List of indicators to calculate

modules.name: positionbt.utils.validation
documentation: Data validation utilities

functions.name: positionbt.utils.validation.validate_commission
documentation:
Validate commission rate

Args:
    commission: Commission rate as a float

Raises:
    ValidationError: If commission is not a number or not between 0 and 1

functions.name: positionbt.utils.validation.validate_annual_trading_days
documentation:
Validate annual trading days

Args:
    days: Number of trading days in a year

Raises:
    ValidationError: If days is not a positive integer or exceeds 365

functions.name: positionbt.utils.validation.validate_indicators
documentation:
Validate indicator parameters and return sorted list of indicators including dependencies

Args:
    indicators: Indicator name or list of names

Returns:
    List[str]: Sorted list of indicators including all dependencies

Raises:
    ValidationError: If indicators parameter is invalid

functions.name: positionbt.utils.validation.validate_and_convert_input
documentation:
Validate and convert input data

Args:
    df: Input DataFrame
    data_type: Data type, either 'close' or 'position'

Returns:
    pl.DataFrame: Validated and converted Polars DataFrame

Raises:
    ValidationError: If data does not meet requirements

functions.name: positionbt.utils.validation.validate_time_alignment
documentation:
Validate time alignment

Args:
    close_df: Price data DataFrame
    position_df: Position data DataFrame

Raises:
    ValidationError: If timestamps are not aligned

functions.name: positionbt.utils.validation.validate_data_type
documentation:
Validate data type is either float or polars.DataFrame

Args:
    data: Data to validate

Returns:
    Union[float, pl.DataFrame]: Validated data

Raises:
    ValidationError: If data type is invalid

classes.name: positionbt.utils.validation.ValidationError
documentation: Exception raised for errors in the data validation process.
